title: eulophia citrina
intro: Eulophia citrina, also known as the Golden Orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eulophia citrina include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Eulophia citrina is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to develop new treatments and remedies.
